choices.text: Δv = Isp × g₀ × ln(m₀/mf). Delta-v grows logarithmically with propellant mass ratio. Higher Isp + more propellant = more delta-v. Why staging required (drop dead mass).
Chemical (LH2+LOX) ~440s (highest chem); kerosene/LOX ~280-340s; methane/LOX ~330s; solid ~250s; ion ~3000s (low thrust); nuclear thermal ~900s. Pick by mission profile.
